title: cieca trisetosa
intro: Cieca trisetosa, commonly known as Cieca, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation in the body. The therapeutic actions of Cieca trisetosa include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic, making it useful in treating conditions such as wounds, infections, and fever. The bioactive constituents of Cieca trisetosa include flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
